page.title: List of Shikinaisha in Awaji Province

revision.comment: 各国の式内社表の掲載。ただし、式内比定社は現在名神大社のみの状態、国史見在社・式外社も未掲載の状態。
revision.text:
'''淡路国の式内社一覧'''（あわじのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[延喜式]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「[[式内社]]」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[淡路国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。 また[[式外社]]として、当時すでに当国に存在したはずであるのに『延喜式神名帳』に記載の無い神社についても付記する。 == 式内社 == 『延喜式神名帳』には、大社2座2社（いずれも名神大社）・小社11座11社の計13座13社が記載。 {{注|（凡例）
1）「神名帳」列は、[http://kindai.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/1442211 『延喜式 上巻』]（大岡山書店、昭和4年、近代デジタルライブラリー）等における『[[延喜式神名帳]]』の記載を基に作成。社名表記は[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/jinjaindex.html 神社史料集成]における字体（異体字がある場合には新字体・通用性の高い字体を使用）を基準とした。読みの「-」部分は、「神社」以外で仮名が振られていない部分。「○座」は座数を表し、一座の場合は記載していない。
2）格の「名神大」は[[名神大社]]を、「大」は式内大社（名神大社除く）を、「小」は式内小社を意味する。付記は社名とともに記されているもので、その主要なものについては「[[式内社#式内社の社格]]」を参照。
3）比定社が複数ある場合、最も有力なものを無冠で示し、他の論社には「（論）」を冠した。
4）本来の式内社とは認めがたいものの、式内社を合祀したなど、その後継を主張するもの、その他参考の神社には「（参）」を冠した。}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; white-space:nowrap" align="left" !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=4 | 神名帳 !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=3 | 比定社 !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" rowspan=2 | 集成 |- !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" | 社名 !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" | 読み !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" | 格 !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" | 付記 !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" | 社名 !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" | 所在地 !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" | 備考 |- |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[津名郡]]''' 9座（大1座・小8座） |- |'''淡路伊佐奈伎神社'''||-イサナキノ||名神大||||淡路伊佐奈岐神社||[[伊弉諾神宮]]||[[兵庫県]][[淡路市]]||[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/530001.html] |- |'''伊勢久留麻神社'''||イセクルマノ||小|||||||||| |- |'''石屋神社'''||イハヤノ||小|||||||||| |- |'''築狭神社'''||ツキサノ||小|||||||||| |- |'''賀茂神社'''||カモノ||小|||||||||| |- |'''由良湊神社'''||ユラノミナトノ||小|||||||||| |- |'''志筑神社'''||シチクノ||小|||||||||| |- |'''岸河神社'''||キシカハノ||小|||||||||| |- |'''河上神社'''||カハカミノ||小|||||||||| |- |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[三原郡]]''' 4座（大1座・小3座） |- |'''笶原神社'''||ヤハラノ||小|||||||||| |- |'''湊口神社'''||ミナクチノ
ミナトクチノ||小|||||||||| |- |'''大和大国魂神社'''||-クニタマノ||名神大||||[[大和大国魂神社]]||兵庫県[[南あわじ市]]||||[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/536001.html] |- |'''久度神社'''||クトノ||小|||||||||| |} {{-}} {{節stub}} == 式外社 == 当時すでに存在したはずであるのに『延喜式神名帳』に記載の無い神社。 === 国史見在社 === [[六国史]]に記載のある式外社。 {{節stub}} === その他 === 国史見在社以外の式外社。 {{節stub}} == 参考文献 == * 皇典講究所・全国神職会校訂[http://kindai.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/1442211 『延喜式 上巻』]（大岡山書店、昭和4年） - 近代デジタルライブラリー * [http://kindai.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/1273537 『延喜式 第2』]（日本古典全集刊行会、昭和4年） - 近代デジタルライブラリー == 外部リンク == * [http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/jinjastate53.html 淡路国 式内社13座]（國學院大學21世紀COEプログラム「神道・神社史料集成」） {{式内社一覧}} [[Category:淡路国の式内社|*]]

revision.comment: /* 式内社 */ 凡例追記。
revision.text:
'''淡路国の式内社一覧'''（あわじのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[延喜式]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「[[式内社]]」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[淡路国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。 また[[式外社]]として、当時すでに当国に存在したはずであるのに『延喜式神名帳』に記載の無い神社についても付記する。 == 式内社 == 『延喜式神名帳』には、大社2座2社（いずれも名神大社）・小社11座11社の計13座13社が記載。 {{注|（凡例）
1）「神名帳」列は、[http://kindai.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/1442211 『延喜式 上巻』]（大岡山書店、昭和4年、近代デジタルライブラリー）等における『[[延喜式神名帳]]』の記載を基に作成。社名表記は[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/jinjaindex.html 神社史料集成]（5を参照）における字体（異体字がある場合には新字体・通用性の高い字体を使用）を基準とした。読みの「-」部分は、「神社」以外で仮名が振られていない部分。「○座」は座数を表し、一座の場合は記載していない。
2）格の「名神大」は[[名神大社]]を、「大」は式内大社（名神大社除く）を、「小」は式内小社を意味する。付記は社名とともに記されているもので、その主要なものについては「[[式内社#式内社の社格]]」を参照。
3）比定社が複数ある場合、最も有力なものを無冠で示し、他の論社には「（論）」を冠した。
4）本来の式内社とは認めがたいものの、式内社を合祀したなど、その後継を主張するもの、その他参考の神社には「（参）」を冠した。
5）「集成」列は[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/jinjaindex.html 神社史料集成]（國學院大學21世紀COEプログラム「神道・神社史料集成」）における神社項へのリンク先を記載。}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; white-space:nowrap" align="left" !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=4 | 神名帳 !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=3 | 比定社 !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" rowspan=2 | 集成 |- !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" | 社名 !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" | 読み !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" | 格 !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" | 付記 !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" | 社名 !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" | 所在地 !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" | 備考 |- |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[津名郡]]''' 9座（大1座・小8座） |- |'''淡路伊佐奈伎神社'''||-イサナキノ||名神大||||淡路伊佐奈岐神社||[[伊弉諾神宮]]||[[兵庫県]][[淡路市]]||[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/530001.html] |- |'''伊勢久留麻神社'''||イセクルマノ||小|||||||||| |- |'''石屋神社'''||イハヤノ||小|||||||||| |- |'''築狭神社'''||ツキサノ||小|||||||||| |- |'''賀茂神社'''||カモノ||小|||||||||| |- |'''由良湊神社'''||ユラノミナトノ||小|||||||||| |- |'''志筑神社'''||シチクノ||小|||||||||| |- |'''岸河神社'''||キシカハノ||小|||||||||| |- |'''河上神社'''||カハカミノ||小|||||||||| |- |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[三原郡]]''' 4座（大1座・小3座） |- |'''笶原神社'''||ヤハラノ||小|||||||||| |- |'''湊口神社'''||ミナクチノ
ミナトクチノ||小|||||||||| |- |'''大和大国魂神社'''||-クニタマノ||名神大||||[[大和大国魂神社]]||兵庫県[[南あわじ市]]||||[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/536001.html] |- |'''久度神社'''||クトノ||小|||||||||| |} {{-}} {{節stub}} == 式外社 == 当時すでに存在したはずであるのに『延喜式神名帳』に記載の無い神社。 === 国史見在社 === [[六国史]]に記載のある式外社。 {{節stub}} === その他 === 国史見在社以外の式外社。 {{節stub}} == 参考文献 == * 皇典講究所・全国神職会校訂[http://kindai.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/1442211 『延喜式 上巻』]（大岡山書店、昭和4年） - 近代デジタルライブラリー * [http://kindai.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/1273537 『延喜式 第2』]（日本古典全集刊行会、昭和4年） - 近代デジタルライブラリー == 外部リンク == * [http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/jinjastate53.html 淡路国 式内社13座]（國學院大學21世紀COEプログラム「神道・神社史料集成」） {{式内社一覧}} [[Category:淡路国の式内社|*]]

revision.text:
'''淡路国の式内社一覧'''（あわじのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[延喜式]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「[[式内社]]」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[淡路国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。 また[[式外社]]として、当時すでに当国に存在したはずであるのに『延喜式神名帳』に記載の無い神社についても付記する。 == 式内社 == 『延喜式神名帳』には、大社2座2社（いずれも名神大社）・小社11座11社の計13座13社が記載。 {{注|（凡例）
1）「神名帳」列は、[http://kindai.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/1442211 『延喜式 上巻』]（大岡山書店、昭和4年、近代デジタルライブラリー）等における『[[延喜式神名帳]]』の記載を基に作成。社名表記は[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/jinjaindex.html 神社史料集成]（5を参照）における字体（異体字がある場合には新字体・通用性の高い字体を使用）を基準とした。読みの「-」部分は、「神社」以外で仮名が振られていない部分。「○座」は座数を表し、一座の場合は記載していない。
2）格の「名神大」は[[名神大社]]を、「大」は式内大社（名神大社除く）を、「小」は式内小社を意味する。付記は社名とともに記されているもので、その主要なものについては「[[式内社#式内社の社格]]」を参照。
3）比定社が複数ある場合、最も有力なものを無冠で示し、他の論社には「（論）」を冠した。
4）本来の式内社とは認めがたいものの、式内社を合祀したなど、その後継を主張するもの、その他参考の神社には「（参）」を冠した。
5）「集成」列は[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/jinjaindex.html 神社史料集成]（國學院大學21世紀COEプログラム「神道・神社史料集成」）における神社項へのリンク先を記載。}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; white-space:nowrap" align="left" !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=4 | 神名帳 !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=3 | 比定社 !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" rowspan=2 | 集成 |- !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" | 社名 !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" | 読み !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" | 格 !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" | 付記 !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" | 社名 !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" | 所在地 !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" | 備考 |- |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[津名郡]]''' 9座（大1座・小8座） |- |'''淡路伊佐奈伎神社'''||-イサナキノ||名神大||||淡路伊佐奈岐神社||[[伊弉諾神宮]]||[[兵庫県]][[淡路市]]||[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/530001.html] |- |'''伊勢久留麻神社'''||イセクルマノ||小|||||||||| |- |'''石屋神社'''||イハヤノ||小|||||||||| |- |'''築狭神社'''||ツキサノ||小|||||||||| |- |'''賀茂神社'''||カモノ||小|||||||||| |- |'''由良湊神社'''||ユラノミナトノ||小|||||||||| |- |'''志筑神社'''||シチクノ||小|||||||||| |- |'''岸河神社'''||キシカハノ||小|||||||||| |- |'''河上神社'''||カハカミノ||小|||||||||| |- |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[三原郡]]''' 4座（大1座・小3座） |- |'''笶原神社'''||ヤハラノ||小|||||||||| |- |'''湊口神社'''||ミナクチノ
ミナトクチノ||小|||||||||| |- |'''大和大国魂神社'''||-クニタマノ||名神大||||[[大和大国魂神社]]||兵庫県[[南あわじ市]]||||[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/536001.html] |- |'''久度神社'''||クトノ||小|||||||||| |} {{-}} {{節stub}} == 式外社 == 当時すでに存在したはずであるのに『延喜式神名帳』に記載の無い神社。 === 国史見在社 === [[六国史]]に記載のある式外社。 {{節stub}} === その他 === 国史見在社以外の式外社。 {{節stub}} == 参考文献 == * 皇典講究所・全国神職会校訂[http://kindai.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/1442211 『延喜式 上巻』]（大岡山書店、昭和4年） - 近代デジタルライブラリー * [http://kindai.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/1273537 『延喜式 第2』]（日本古典全集刊行会、昭和4年） - 近代デジタルライブラリー == 外部リンク == * [http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/jinjastate53.html 淡路国 式内社13座]（國學院大學21世紀COEプログラム「神道・神社史料集成」） {{式内社一覧}} {{DEFAULTSORT:あわしのくにのしきないしやいちらん}} [[Category:淡路国の式内社|*]] [[Category:式内社の一覧]]

revision.text:
'''淡路国の式内社一覧'''（あわじのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[延喜式]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「[[式内社]]」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[淡路国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。
また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。
== 式内社 == {{節stub}} 『延喜式』神名帳では、大社2座2社（いずれも名神大社）・小社11座11社の計13座13社を記載。
{{式内社一覧/凡例}} {{式内社一覧/header}} {{淡路国津名郡の式内社一覧}} {{淡路国三原郡の式内社一覧}} {{式内社一覧/footer}}
== 式外社 == {{節stub}} 『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが、同帳に記載の無い神社。
== 参考文献 == * 皇典講究所・全国神職会校訂[{{NDLDC|1442211/160}} 『延喜式 上巻』]（大岡山書店、昭和4年） - 国立国会図書館デジタルコレクション * [{{NDLDC|1273537/37}} 『延喜式 第2』]（日本古典全集刊行会、昭和4年） - 国立国会図書館デジタルコレクション
== 外部リンク == * [http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/jinjastate53.html 淡路国 式内社13座] - 國學院大學21世紀COEプログラム「神道・神社史料集成」

revision.text:
'''淡路国の式内社一覧'''（あわじのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[Engishiki]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「[[式内社]]」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[淡路国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。
また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。
== 式内社 == {{節stub}} 『延喜式』神名帳では、大社2座2社（いずれもMyojin Taisha社）・小社11座11社の計13座13社を記載。
{{式内社一覧/凡例}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=4 | {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳}} ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=3 | Designated Shrines ! style="background:#a0f0a0" rowspan=2 | Compilation |- style="white-space:nowrap;" ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.6em; padding-left:2.6em;" | Shrine Name ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Reading ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Rank ! style="background:#a0f0a0;" | Note ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.6em; padding-left:2.6em;" | Shrine Name ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Location ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.3em; padding-left:2.3em;" | Remarks |- {{淡路国津名郡の式内社一覧}} {{淡路国三原郡の式内社一覧}} |style="text-align:right; font-size:85%" colspan="8"|[[{{transclude|式内社一覧/凡例}}|凡例を表示]] |}
== 式外社 == {{節stub}} 『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが、同帳に記載の無い神社。
== 参考文献 == * 皇典講究所・全国神職会校訂[{{NDLDC|1442211/160}} 『延喜式 上巻』]（大岡山書店、昭和4年） - 国立国会図書館デジタルコレクション * [{{NDLDC|1273537/37}} 『延喜式 第2』]（日本古典全集刊行会、昭和4年） - 国立国会図書館デジタルコレクション

'''淡路国の式内社一覧'''（あわじのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[Engishiki]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「[[式内社]]」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[淡路国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。
また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。
== 式内社 == {{節stub}} 『延喜式』神名帳では、大社2座2社（いずれもMyojin Taisha社）・小社11座11社の計13座13社を記載。
{{List of Shikinai Shrines/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=4 | {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳}} ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=3 | Designated Shrines ! style="background:#a0f0a0" rowspan=2 | Compilation |- style="white-space:nowrap;" ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.6em; padding-left:2.6em;" | Shrine Name ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Reading ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Rank ! style="background:#a0f0a0;" | Note ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.6em; padding-left:2.6em;" | Shrine Name ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Location ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.3em; padding-left:2.3em;" | Remarks |- {{淡路国津名郡の式内社一覧}} {{淡路国三原郡の式内社一覧}} |style="text-align:right; font-size:85%" colspan="8"|[[{{transclude|List of Shikinai Shrines/Legend}}|凡例を表示]] |}
== 式外社 == {{節stub}} 『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが、同帳に記載の無い神社。
== 参考文献 == * 皇典講究所・全国神職会校訂[{{NDLDC|1442211/160}} 『延喜式 上巻』]（大岡山書店、昭和4年） - 国立国会図書館デジtarukorekushiョn * [{{NDLDC|1273537/37}} 『延喜式 第2』]（日本古典全集刊行会、昭和4年） - 国立国会図書館デジtarukorekushiョn
== 外部rinku == * [http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/jinjastate53.html 淡路国 式内社13座] - 國學院大學21世紀COEプroグramu「神道・神社史料集成」

revision.text:
'''淡路国の式内社一覧'''（あわじのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[Engishiki]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「[[式内社]]」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[淡路国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。
また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。
== 式内社 == {{節stub}} 『延喜式』神名帳では、大社2座2社（いずれもMyojin Taisha社）・小社11座11社の計13座13社を記載。
{{List of Shikinai Shrines/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=4 | {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳}} ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=3 | Designated Shrines ! style="background:#a0f0a0" rowspan=2 | Compilation |- style="white-space:nowrap;" ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.6em; padding-left:2.6em;" | Shrine Name ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Reading ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Rank ! style="background:#a0f0a0;" | Note ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.6em; padding-left:2.6em;" | Shrine Name ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Location ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.3em; padding-left:2.3em;" | Remarks |- {{淡路国津名郡の式内社一覧}} {{淡路国三原郡の式内社一覧}} |style="text-align:right; font-size:85%" colspan="8"|[[{{transclude|List of Shikinai Shrines/Legend}}|凡例を表示]] |}
== 式外社 == {{節stub}} 『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが、同帳に記載の無い神社。
== 参考文献 == * 皇典講究所・全国神職会校訂[{{NDLDC|1442211/160}} 『延喜式 上巻』]（大岡山書店、昭和4年） - 国立国会図書館デジtarukorekushiョn * [{{NDLDC|1273537/37}} 『延喜式 第2』]（日本古典全集刊行会、昭和4年） - 国立国会図書館デジtarukorekushiョn

また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。

{{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Awaji Province[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:49, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at [[List of Shikinaisha in Awaji Province]] - [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Awaji Province[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} '''淡路国の式内社一覧'''（あわじのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[Engishiki]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「[[式内社]]」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[淡路国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。 また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。 == 式内社 == {{節stub}} 『延喜式』神名帳では、大社2座2社（いずれもMyojin Taisha社）・小社11座11社の計13座13社を記載。 {{List of Shikinai Shrines/Legend}} ==Shikinaisha removed from templates== ==Shikinaisha List Templates to be Depopulated== {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Awaji Province[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:49, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at [[List of Shikinaisha in Awaji Province]] - [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Awaji Province[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} '''淡路国の式内社一覧'''（あわじのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[Engishiki]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「[[式内社]]」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[淡路国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。 また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。 == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == In the Engishiki, a list of Shinto shrines is given to large shrines.2座2社（いずれもMyojin Taisha社）・小社11座11社の計13座13社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} ==Shikinaisha removed from templates== ==Shikinaisha List Templates to be Depopulated== {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Awaji Province'''. Or the list of shrines in Awaji Province which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|12=draft|12=draft}} of LALALAList of Shikinaisha in Awaji Province which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. [[Category:Lists of Shikinaisha by location]] == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == In the Engishiki, a list of Shinto shrines is given to large shrines.2座2社（いずれもMyojin Taisha社）・小社11座11社の計13座13社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} ==Shikinaisha removed from templates== ==Shikinaisha List Templates to be Depopulated== {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; [[category: Lists of Shikinaisha by location top]]This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Awaji Province'''. Or the list of shrines in Awaji Province which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|12=draft|12=draft}} of Awaji Province which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Awaji Province'''. Or the list of shrines in Awaji Province which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|12=draft|12=draft}} of Awaji Province which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. [[Category:Lists of Shikinaisha by location]] == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == In the Engishiki, a list of Shinto shrines is given to large shrines.2座2社（いずれもMyojin Taisha社）・小社11座11社の計13座13社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} ==Shikinaisha removed from templates== ==Shikinaisha List Templates to be Depopulated== {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; [[Category:Shikinaisha top]]This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Awaji Province'''. Or the list of shrines in Awaji Province which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|12=draft|12=draft}} of Awaji Province which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. [[Category:Shikinaisha top]] [[Category:Ones with only the top marked]] [[Category:Shikinaisha top]] [[Category:Ones with only the top marked]] This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Awaji Province'''. Or the list of shrines in Awaji Province which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|12=draft|12=draft}} of Awaji Province which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. Or the list of shrines in Awaji Province which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|12=draft|12=draft}} of Awaji Province which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. [[Category:Shikinaisha top]] [[Category:Shikinaisha top]] This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Awaji Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Awaji Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|12=draft|12=draft}} of [[Awaji Province which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. [[Category:Lists of Shikinaisha by location]] == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == In the Engishiki, a list of Shinto shrines is given to large shrines.2座2社（いずれもMyojin Taisha社）・小社11座11社の計13座13社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} ==Shikinaisha removed from templates== ==Shikinaisha List Templates to be Depopulated== {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; [[Category:Shikinaisha top]] [[Category:Shikinaisha top]] This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Awaji Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Awaji Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|12=draft|12=draft}} of [[Awaji Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion.[[Category:edited lists]] [[Category:Lists of Shikinaisha by location]] == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == In the Engishiki, a list of Shinto shrines is given to large shrines.2座2社（いずれもMyojin Taisha社）・小社11座11社の計13座13社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} ==Shikinaisha removed from templates== ==Shikinaisha List Templates to be Depopulated== {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; Or the list of shrines in [[Awaji Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha}} of [[Awaji Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion.[[Category:edited lists]] [[Category:Lists of Shikinaisha by location]] == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == In the Engishiki, a list of Shinto shrines is given to large shrines.2座2社（いずれもMyojin Taisha社）・小社11座11社の計13座13社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} ==Shikinaisha removed from templates== ==Shikinaisha List Templates to be Depopulated== {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! Or the list of shrines in [[Awaji Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha}} of [[Awaji Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion.[[Category:edited lists]] [[Category:Lists of Shikinaisha by location]] == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == In the Engishiki, a list of Shinto shrines is given to large shrines.2座2社（いずれもMyojin Taisha社）・小社11座11社の計13座13社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} ==Shikinaisha removed from templates== ==Shikinaisha List Templates to be Depopulated== {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft}} of [[Awaji Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == In the Engishiki, a list of Shinto shrines is given to large shrines.2座2社（いずれもMyojin Taisha社）・小社11座11社の計13座13社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} ==Shikinaisha removed from templates== ==Shikinaisha List Templates to be Depopulated== {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Awaji Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Awaji Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Awaji Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Awaji Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft}} of [[Awaji Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == In the Engishiki, a list of Shinto shrines is given to large shrines.2座2社（いずれもMyojin Taisha社）・小社11座11社の計13座13社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} ==Shikinaisha removed from templates== ==Shikinaisha List Templates to be Depopulated== {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Awaji Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Awaji Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft}} of [[Awaji Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == In the Engishiki, a list of Shinto shrines is given to large shrines.2座2社（いずれもMyojin Taisha社）・小社11座11社の計13座13社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} ==Shikinaisha removed from templates== ==Shikinaisha List Templates to be Depopulated== {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Awaji Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Awaji Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=}} of [[Awaji Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Awaji Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Awaji Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=}} of [[Awaji Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinaisha (式内社) == In the Engishiki, a list of Shinto shrines is given to large shrines.2座2社（いずれもMyojin Taisha社）・小社11座11社の計13座13社を記載。 This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Awaji Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Awaji Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=}} of [[Awaji Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinaisha (式内社) == In the Engishiki, a list of Shinto shrines is given to large shrines.2座2社（いずれもMyojin Taisha社）・小社11座11社の計13座13社を記載。 revision.comment: Text replacement - "Engishiki Jinmyocho" to "Engishiki Jinmyōchō"
revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Awaji Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Awaji Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=}} of [[Awaji Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinaisha (式内社) == In the Engishiki, a list of Shinto shrines is given to large shrines.2座2社（いずれもMyojin Taisha社）・小社11座11社の計13座13社を記載。 revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Awaji Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Awaji Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=}} of [[Awaji Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinaisha (式内社) == In the Engishiki, a list of Shinto shrines is given to large shrines.2座2社（いずれもMyojin Taisha社）・小社11座11社の計13座13社を記載。 This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Awaji Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Awaji Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Awaji Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinaisha (式内社) == In the Engishiki, a list of Shinto shrines is given to large shrines.2座2社（いずれもMyojin Taisha社）・小社11座11社の計13座13社を記載。 revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Awaji Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[:en:Awaji Province|Awaji Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[:en:Awaji Province|Awaji Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinaisha (式内社) == In the Engishiki, a list of Shinto shrines is given to large shrines.2座2社（いずれもMyojin Taisha社）・小社11座11社の計13座13社を記載。 This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Awaji Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[:en:Awaji Province|Awaji Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[:en:Awaji Province|Awaji Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Awaji Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[:en:Awaji Province|Awaji Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[:en:Awaji Province|Awaji Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinaisha (式内社) == In the Engishiki, a list of Shinto shrines is given to large shrines.2座2社（いずれもMyojin Taisha社）・小社11座11社の計13座13社を記載。 revision.comment: Moving from [[Category:淡路国の式内社]] to [[Category:Awaji Province]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Awaji Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[:en:Awaji Province|Awaji Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[:en:Awaji Province|Awaji Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinaisha (式内社) == In the Engishiki, a list of Shinto shrines is given to large shrines.2座2社（いずれもMyojin Taisha社）・小社11座11社の計13座13社を記載。 revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Awaji Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[:en:Awaji Province|Awaji Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[:en:Awaji Province|Awaji Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinaisha (式内社) == In the Engishiki, a list of Shinto shrines is given to large shrines.2座2社（いずれもMyojin Taisha社）・小社11座11社の計13座13社を記載。 Or the list of shrines in [[:en:Awaji Province|Awaji Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11559808]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:52, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Awaji Province'''. Or the list of shrines in [[:en:Awaji Province|Awaji Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[:en:Awaji Province|Awaji Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinaisha (式内社) == In the Engishiki, a list of Shinto shrines is given to large shrines.2座2社（いずれもMyojin Taisha社）・小社11座11社の計13座13社を記載。 {afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11559808]]} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Awaji Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Awaji Province]] which is present in the {ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}
On this page we will also cover the {ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect} of [[Awaji Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The ''Engishiki'' counts **13 shikinaisha** in the province – **11 shosha** and **2 taisha**.

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:29, 28 June 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Awaji Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Awaji Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Awaji Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 13 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 11 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 2 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11559808]]
[[:ja:淡路国の式内社一覧]]
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:21, 28 June 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Awaji Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Awaji Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Awaji Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 13 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 11 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 2 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:52, 28 June 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Awaji Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Awaji Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Awaji Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 13 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 11 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 2 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Awaji Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 13 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 11 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 2 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Awaji Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 13 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 11 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 2 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

revision.comment: Bot: refresh list tables from Wikidata (counts fixed)
revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11559808]]
[[:ja:淡路国の式内社一覧]]
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:07, 3 July 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Awaji Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Awaji Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Awaji Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 13 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 11 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 2 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11559808]]
[[:ja:淡路国の式内社一覧]]
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 14:53, 3 July 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Awaji Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Awaji Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Awaji Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 13 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 11 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 2 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:58, 4 July 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Awaji Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Awaji Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 14:08, 4 July 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Awaji Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Awaji Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}

revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11559808]]
[[:ja:淡路国の式内社一覧]]
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:06, 5 July 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Awaji Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Awaji Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Awaji Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 13 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 11 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 2 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11559808]]
[[:ja:淡路国の式内社一覧]]
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:33, 5 July 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Awaji Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Awaji Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Awaji Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 13 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 11 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 2 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11559808]]
[[:ja:淡路国の式内社一覧]]
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:35, 6 July 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Awaji Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Awaji Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Awaji Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 13 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 11 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 2 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Awaji Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 13 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 11 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 2 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:14, 7 July 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Awaji Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Awaji Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Awaji Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 13 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 11 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 2 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:37, 7 July 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Awaji Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Awaji Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Awaji Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 13 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 11 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 2 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11559808]]
[[:ja:淡路国の式内社一覧]]
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:36, 12 July 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Awaji Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Awaji Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Awaji Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 13 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 11 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 2 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11559808]]
[[:ja:淡路国の式内社一覧]]
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:36, 12 July 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Awaji Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Awaji Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Awaji Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 13 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 11 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 2 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.
== Shikinaisha (式内社) == {| class="wikitable sortable" ! Prov !! Name !! Kana !! The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 13 Shikinaisha in the province – 11 Shikinai Shosha and 2 Shikinai Taisha.

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:38, 21 November 2025 (UTC)}}
This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Awaji Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 13 Shikinaisha in the province – 11 Shikinai Shosha and 2 Shikinai Taisha.

This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Awaji Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 13 Shikinaisha in the province – 11 Shikinai Shosha and 2 Shikinai Taisha.

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:38, 21 November 2025 (UTC)}}
This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Awaji Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 13 Shikinaisha in the province – 11 Shikinai Shosha and 2 Shikinai Taisha.

This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Awaji Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 13 Shikinaisha in the province – 11 Shikinai Shosha and 2 Shikinai Taisha.

This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Awaji Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 13 Shikinaisha in the province – 11 Shikinai Shosha and 2 Shikinai Taisha.

This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Awaji Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 13 Shikinaisha in the province – 11 Shikinai Shosha and 2 Shikinai Taisha.

This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Awaji Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 13 Shikinaisha in the province – 11 Shikinai Shosha and 2 Shikinai Taisha.

This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Awaji Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 13 Shikinaisha in the province – 11 Shikinai Shosha and 2 Shikinai Taisha.

This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Awaji Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 13 Shikinaisha in the province – 11 Shikinai Shosha and 2 Shikinai Taisha.

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:38, 21 November 2025 (UTC)}}
This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Awaji Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 13 Shikinaisha in the province – 11 Shikinai Shosha and 2 Shikinai Taisha.

This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Awaji Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 13 Shikinaisha in the province – 11 Shikinai Shōsha and 2 Shikinai Taisha.

This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Awaji Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 13 Shikinaisha in the province – 11 Shikinai Shōsha and 2 Shikinai Taisha.

[[:ja:淡路国の式内社一覧]]

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:29, 16 February 2026 (UTC)}}
This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Awaji Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 13 Shikinaisha in the province – 11 Shikinai Shosha and 2 Shikinai Taisha.

[[:ja:淡路国の式内社一覧]]

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:29, 16 February 2026 (UTC)}}
This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Awaji Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 13 Shikinaisha in the province – 11 Shikinai Shosha and 2 Shikinai Taisha.
